title: mentha pseudolucorum
intro: Mentha pseudolucorum, also known as Moroccan mint or mint of the rocks, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha pseudolucorum include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve oral health. The herbal preparations of Mentha pseudolucorum include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used in various forms, such as topical applications, aromatherapy, and dietary supplements.
